title: Affinity Flak
description: A plugin that stops explosive pvp and general explosions, can stop, tnt, anchors, crystals, and beds, can be used for anti crystal pvp and more
body:
![Horion-Productions](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/1159783773026648116/1165812386993803264/minecraft_title.png?ex=65483664&is=6535c164&hm=6db85a1ffabcf03868ce831ef0f598b4379bda80bb6022b8020c56781d4b5eef&=)
**A plugin to manage explosions, can stop anything from being able to explode, nerf the explosion itself, or buff it** **All sources are configurable in the config, and can be buffed or nerfed in config**
